user.title: Climate Advisor Setup
user.description: Configure your Climate Advisor integration. Select the entities it should monitor and control.

data_description.weather_entity: The weather integration Climate Advisor uses for forecasts and outdoor conditions.
data_description.climate_entity: The thermostat Climate Advisor will monitor and control.
data_description.comfort_heat: Target temperature when heating and someone is home.
data_description.comfort_cool: Target temperature when cooling and someone is home.
data_description.setback_heat: Lower temperature used when away from home to save energy.
data_description.setback_cool: Higher temperature used when away from home to save energy.
data_description.sleep_heat: Target temperature when heating during sleep hours (when home). Must be between away setback and comfort temperature.
data_description.sleep_cool: Target temperature when cooling during sleep hours (when home). Must be between comfort and away setback temperature.
data_description.notify_service: The Home Assistant notify service for alerts and daily briefings (e.g. notify.mobile_app_yourphone).

temperature_sources.title: Temperature Sources
temperature_sources.description: Choose where Climate Advisor reads outdoor and indoor temperature data from.

data_description.outdoor_temp_source: Where to read outside temperature. 'Weather service' uses your weather integration; a dedicated sensor or input helper lets you use a specific entity.
data_description.indoor_temp_source: Where to read inside temperature. 'Climate entity' uses your thermostat's built-in sensor; a dedicated sensor or input helper lets you use a separate entity.

outdoor_temp_entity.title: Outdoor Temperature Entity
outdoor_temp_entity.description: Select the entity that provides outdoor temperature readings.

data_description.outdoor_temp_entity: Choose the sensor or input helper that reports outdoor temperature.

indoor_temp_entity.title: Indoor Temperature Entity
indoor_temp_entity.description: Select the entity that provides indoor temperature readings.

data_description.indoor_temp_entity: Choose the sensor or input helper that reports indoor temperature.

sensors.title: Door & Window Sensors
sensors.description:
Select binary sensors that Climate Advisor should monitor. When a sensor indicates a door or window is open, HVAC will be paused to avoid wasting energy.

You can select individual sensors or a binary sensor group entity that bundles multiple sensors together.

The polarity toggle controls how sensor states are interpreted. Most sensors use the Home Assistant standard where 'on' means open (unsafe). If your sensors report the opposite, enable the invert toggle.

data.sensor_polarity_inverted: Invert sensor polarity (on = closed instead of open)

data_description.door_window_sensors: Select any binary sensor entities to monitor, including binary sensor groups that bundle multiple sensors together.
data_description.sensor_polarity_inverted: Enable this if your sensors report 'on' when closed and 'off' when open, which is the opposite of the Home Assistant standard.
data_description.sensor_debounce_seconds: How long a door/window must stay open before HVAC is paused. Prevents brief openings (like walking through a door) from triggering a pause.
data_description.manual_grace_seconds: How long to wait after you manually adjust the thermostat before Climate Advisor resumes automation. Gives you time to enjoy your chosen temperature.
data_description.automation_grace_seconds: How long to wait after Climate Advisor makes an automated change before allowing another one. Prevents rapid back-to-back adjustments.
data_description.override_confirm_seconds: Time between system changes and confirmation of manual override. Transient events (thermostat restart, fan cycles) that resolve within this window are ignored automatically. Set to 0 to confirm overrides immediately.
data_description.fan_mode: How to control fans for ventilation. 'Whole house fan' controls a dedicated fan entity. 'HVAC fan' uses the thermostat fan mode. 'Both' uses both.
data_description.fan_entity: The fan or switch entity to control (only needed for whole house fan mode).
data_description.fan_min_runtime_per_hour: Minutes of fan runtime per hour (0 = disabled, 60 = always on). The cycle is not clock-aligned — it offsets naturally based on when HA started.

occupancy.title: Occupancy Awareness
occupancy.description: Configure toggle entities that tell Climate Advisor who is home. All fields are optional — leave blank if you don't use that feature.

data_description.home_toggle_entity: An entity (input_boolean, switch, etc.) that indicates whether someone is home. ON = home, OFF = away.
data_description.home_toggle_invert: Enable if your toggle reports ON when you're away and OFF when you're home.
data_description.vacation_toggle_entity: An entity that indicates vacation mode. When active, a deeper temperature setback is applied for extended energy savings.
data_description.vacation_toggle_invert: Enable if your toggle reports ON when you're NOT on vacation.
data_description.guest_toggle_entity: An entity that indicates guests are present. Overrides vacation and away modes — comfort temperature is maintained.
data_description.guest_toggle_invert: Enable if your toggle reports ON when guests are NOT present.
data_description.welcome_home_debounce_seconds: Minimum time between welcome home notifications. If you leave and return within this window, the notification is suppressed. Set to 0 to always notify.

schedule.title: Daily Schedule
schedule.description: Set your household schedule so Climate Advisor knows when to warm up, cool down, and send briefings.

data_description.wake_time: When your household typically wakes up. Climate Advisor starts warming or cooling to your comfort temperature before this time.
data_description.sleep_time: When your household typically goes to bed. Climate Advisor switches to your away/sleep temperature at this time.
data_description.briefing_time: When to deliver the daily climate briefing notification with the day's forecast and HVAC plan.

error.invalid_notify_service: Must be in domain.service format (e.g. notify.mobile_app_phone)
error.setback_must_be_lower: Setback heating temp must be lower than comfort heating temp
error.setback_must_be_higher: Setback cooling temp must be higher than comfort cooling temp
error.sleep_must_be_below_comfort: Sleep temperature must be below comfort temperature
error.sleep_must_be_above_setback: Sleep temperature must be above away setback temperature
error.sleep_must_be_above_comfort: Sleep temperature must be above comfort temperature
error.sleep_must_be_below_setback: Sleep temperature must be below away setback temperature

core.title: Core Settings
core.description: Configure the main entities and temperature setpoints that Climate Advisor uses.

data_description.weather_entity: The weather integration Climate Advisor uses for forecasts and outdoor conditions.
data_description.climate_entity: The thermostat Climate Advisor will monitor and control.
data_description.comfort_heat: Target temperature when heating and someone is home.
data_description.comfort_cool: Target temperature when cooling and someone is home.
data_description.setback_heat: Lower temperature used when away from home to save energy.
data_description.setback_cool: Higher temperature used when away from home to save energy.
data_description.sleep_heat: Target temperature when heating during sleep hours (when home). Must be between away setback and comfort temperature.
data_description.sleep_cool: Target temperature when cooling during sleep hours (when home). Must be between comfort and away setback temperature.
data_description.notify_service: The Home Assistant notify service for alerts and daily briefings (e.g. notify.mobile_app_yourphone).

temperature_sources.title: Temperature Sources
temperature_sources.description: Choose where Climate Advisor reads outdoor and indoor temperature data from.

data_description.outdoor_temp_source: Where to read outside temperature. 'Weather service' uses your weather integration; a dedicated sensor or input helper lets you use a specific entity.
data_description.outdoor_temp_entity: Choose the sensor or input helper that reports outdoor temperature. Only needed if you selected 'Dedicated sensor' or 'Input helper' above.
data_description.indoor_temp_source: Where to read inside temperature. 'Climate entity' uses your thermostat's built-in sensor; a dedicated sensor or input helper lets you use a separate entity.
data_description.indoor_temp_entity: Choose the sensor or input helper that reports indoor temperature. Only needed if you selected 'Dedicated sensor' or 'Input helper' above.

sensors.title: Sensors & Fan
sensors.description: Configure door/window sensors and fan control. When a sensor indicates a door or window is open, HVAC will be paused to avoid wasting energy.

data.sensor_polarity_inverted: Invert sensor polarity (on = closed instead of open)

data_description.door_window_sensors: Select any binary sensor entities to monitor, including binary sensor groups that bundle multiple sensors together.
data_description.sensor_polarity_inverted: Enable this if your sensors report 'on' when closed and 'off' when open, which is the opposite of the Home Assistant standard.
data_description.sensor_debounce_seconds: How long a door/window must stay open before HVAC is paused. Prevents brief openings from triggering a pause.
data_description.manual_grace_seconds: How long to wait after you manually adjust the thermostat before Climate Advisor resumes automation.
data_description.automation_grace_seconds: How long to wait after Climate Advisor makes an automated change before allowing another one.
data_description.override_confirm_seconds: Time between system changes and confirmation of manual override. Transient events (thermostat restart, fan cycles) that resolve within this window are ignored automatically. Set to 0 to confirm overrides immediately.
data_description.fan_mode: How to control fans for ventilation. 'Whole house fan' controls a dedicated fan entity. 'HVAC fan' uses the thermostat fan mode. 'Both' uses both.
data_description.fan_entity: The fan or switch entity to control (only needed for whole house fan mode).
data_description.fan_min_runtime_per_hour: Minutes of fan runtime per hour (0 = disabled, 60 = always on). The cycle is not clock-aligned — it offsets naturally based on when HA started.
data_description.natural_vent_delta: When a door or window opens and outdoor temperature is within this many degrees above your cooling comfort setpoint, Climate Advisor uses the fan for natural ventilation instead of pausing HVAC. Default is 3°F.

occupancy.title: Occupancy Awareness
occupancy.description: Configure toggle entities that tell Climate Advisor who is home. All fields are optional — leave blank if you don't use that feature.

data_description.home_toggle_entity: An entity (input_boolean, switch, etc.) that indicates whether someone is home. ON = home, OFF = away.
data_description.home_toggle_invert: Enable if your toggle reports ON when you're away and OFF when you're home.
data_description.vacation_toggle_entity: An entity that indicates vacation mode. When active, a deeper temperature setback is applied for extended energy savings.
data_description.vacation_toggle_invert: Enable if your toggle reports ON when you're NOT on vacation.
data_description.guest_toggle_entity: An entity that indicates guests are present. Overrides vacation and away modes — comfort temperature is maintained.
data_description.guest_toggle_invert: Enable if your toggle reports ON when guests are NOT present.
data_description.welcome_home_debounce_seconds: Minimum time between welcome home notifications. If you leave and return within this window, the notification is suppressed. Set to 0 to always notify.

schedule.title: Daily Schedule
schedule.description: Set your household schedule so Climate Advisor knows when to warm up, cool down, and send briefings.

data_description.wake_time: When your household typically wakes up. Climate Advisor starts warming or cooling to your comfort temperature before this time.
data_description.sleep_time: When your household typically goes to bed. Climate Advisor switches to your away/sleep temperature at this time.
data_description.briefing_time: When to deliver the daily climate briefing notification with the day's forecast and HVAC plan.

notifications.title: Notification Preferences
notifications.description: Choose which notifications you receive and on which channels. Push notifications go to your mobile app; email notifications go via the send_email service.

data_description.push_briefing: Send a short TLDR briefing to your phone each morning.
data_description.push_door_window_pause: Send a push notification when HVAC is paused because a door or window has been open too long.
data_description.push_occupancy_home: Send a push notification when someone arrives home and comfort temperature is restored.
data_description.manual_grace_notify: Send a push notification when the manual grace period expires and normal sensor behavior resumes.
data_description.automation_grace_notify: Send a push notification when the automation grace period expires.
data_description.email_briefing: Send the full daily briefing via email with complete forecast and plan details.
data_description.email_door_window_pause: Send an email when HVAC is paused due to an open door or window.
data_description.email_grace_expired: Send an email when a grace period expires and normal sensor behavior resumes.
data_description.email_grace_repause: Send an email when HVAC is re-paused because a door/window is still open after grace expired.
data_description.email_occupancy_home: Send an email when someone arrives home.

advanced.title: Learning & Behavior
advanced.description: Configure how Climate Advisor learns from your preferences and balances comfort vs. savings.

data_description.learning_enabled: When enabled, Climate Advisor learns from your manual adjustments and suggests improvements over time.
data_description.adaptive_preheat_enabled: Use learned heating rate to compute pre-heat start time. Requires learning to be enabled.
data_description.adaptive_setback_enabled: Use learned heating/cooling rate to compute maximum safe setback depth. Requires learning to be enabled.
data_description.weather_bias_enabled: Apply a location-specific correction to tomorrow's forecast based on observed forecast accuracy. Requires learning to be enabled.
data_description.min_preheat_minutes: Shortest pre-heat window the system will ever schedule.
data_description.max_preheat_minutes: Longest pre-heat window the system will ever schedule.
data_description.default_preheat_minutes: Pre-heat duration used before enough observations are collected.
data_description.preheat_safety_margin: Multiplier applied to model-computed pre-heat time as a buffer (e.g. 1.2 = 20% extra).
data_description.max_setback_depth_f: Largest overnight setback the adaptive engine may compute.
data_description.aggressive_savings: When enabled, Climate Advisor favors energy savings over comfort — for example, using wider temperature swings and earlier setbacks.

ai_settings.title: AI Settings
ai_settings.description:
Configure Claude AI integration for intelligent analysis and reporting.
API Key Status: {key_status}

data_description.ai_enabled: Master switch for all AI-powered features. When disabled, Climate Advisor uses only its built-in coded logic.
data_description.ai_api_key: Your Anthropic API key. Get one at console.anthropic.com. Leave blank to keep existing key.
data_description.ai_model: Which Claude model to use. Sonnet is recommended for cost/quality balance.
data_description.ai_reasoning_effort: How much reasoning effort Claude uses. Higher = better analysis but more cost.
data_description.ai_max_tokens: Maximum length of AI responses in tokens (256-8192).
data_description.ai_temperature: Controls randomness. 0 = deterministic, 1.0 = most creative. 0.3 recommended.
data_description.ai_monthly_budget: Maximum estimated monthly spend in USD. Set to 0 for no limit.
data_description.ai_auto_requests_per_day: Maximum automated AI requests per day (resets at midnight).
data_description.ai_manual_requests_per_day: Maximum user-triggered AI requests per day (resets at midnight).
data_description.ai_investigator_enabled: Enable the investigative agent (requires AI to be enabled). Performs deep cross-source analysis to find incongruities and data issues.
data_description.ai_investigator_model: Which Claude model the investigator uses. Opus recommended for deep analysis; Sonnet is more cost-effective.
data_description.ai_investigator_reasoning_effort: How much extended thinking the investigator uses. High recommended — the agent reasons through multiple hypotheses.
data_description.ai_investigator_max_tokens: Maximum token length for investigator reports (256-16384). 8192 recommended.
data_description.ai_investigator_requests_per_day: Maximum investigative analysis runs per day. Each investigation uses extended thinking. Resets at midnight.

error.invalid_notify_service: Must be in domain.service format (e.g. notify.mobile_app_phone)
error.setback_must_be_lower: Setback heating temp must be lower than comfort heating temp
error.setback_must_be_higher: Setback cooling temp must be higher than comfort cooling temp
error.sleep_must_be_below_comfort: Sleep temperature must be below comfort temperature
error.sleep_must_be_above_setback: Sleep temperature must be above away setback temperature
error.sleep_must_be_above_comfort: Sleep temperature must be above comfort temperature
error.sleep_must_be_below_setback: Sleep temperature must be below away setback temperature
error.preheat_min_exceeds_max: Minimum pre-heat time must not exceed maximum pre-heat time
error.preheat_default_exceeds_max: Default pre-heat time must not exceed maximum pre-heat time
error.ai_connection_failed: Could not connect to Claude API. Check your API key and try again.
error.ai_key_required: API key is required when AI features are enabled.
error.ai_max_tokens_out_of_range: Max tokens value is out of the allowed range for this field.

weather_entity_not_found.title: Weather entity not found
weather_entity_not_found.description:
The configured weather entity `{entity_id}` no longer exists in Home Assistant. This usually happens when a weather integration is renamed or reinstalled.

Click **Fix** below to select the correct weather entity.

init.title: Select weather entity
init.description: The previously configured weather entity `{entity_id}` no longer exists. Select the correct weather entity below.

data_description.weather_entity: The weather integration that provides forecasts and outdoor conditions.
